title: Autumn's tail 1
description: A create and origins based mod-pack with adventure, beautiful scenery, and a lot of mobs to befriend and meet!
body:
# Autumn's tail 1

## To have quests you must install the following mods:
- FTB Quests
- FTB Library
- FTB Teams
- FTB XMod compat
- FTB Chunks

After that you will be recieving all the latest quests with every update to the pack.

**Autumn's tail** is a project made by me and my partner with the help of countless alpha testers.

It is a pack that focuses on the evolution of tech starting from the basics of forging and create then ending with nuclear power and mass industrialization!

But there is a twist, another main element of this modpack is the mod origins and how it changes the way the game goes from little changes like mining slower to drastic ones like never going out in the sun.

Explore the vast beautiful world made to entertain you for hours and hours with countless mobs and challenges to face. Find ways to learn magic and use this magic to however you wish even if its for some funny little pranks with your friends.

**If you are interested to beta test** the latest features before they come to the public **If you want to give feedback, ideas or any form help** then don't hesitate to join my discord server where you will be warmly welcomed!

### Future updates + To do list:

- Add more bosses and dungeouns
- Finish the questlines
- Rework some mobs to make them harder

**Non of the mods, additions, or buildings have been made by me.** Those were created by amazing talented people that deserve all the credit in the world so **if you would like to support a specific mod or resourcepack please head to their page and support them directly.** I have just collected the mods and ensured they all work together in a pleasent way for the player to have a nice experience.

[Autumn's tail official discord server](https://discord.gg/CNwwnMeh2r)
